description: Use this skill when a scheduled or delegated @raulinvests X/Twitter posting workflow needs to publish or prepare one original post using browser automation, schedule-owner memory, duplicate checks, no-em-dash copy, keyboard-first X composer fallback, browser_close cleanup, and post-run logging. Use it for prompts like autonomous X posting, scheduled X post, Mara post run, tweet from @raulinvests, or update the X post schedule.
